name: Full memory vector reindex
hypothesis: Re-embedding all memory files will improve semantic search relevance by catching stale or missing chunks

actions.description: Re-embeds all memory files into ChromaDB

success_metric: Total chunk count in vector store
measurement_command: python3 -c "import chromadb; c = chromadb.PersistentClient('agent-system/memory/vector/chroma_store'); col = c.get_collection('workspace_memory'); print(col.count())" 2>/dev/null || echo 0
notes: Safe read-only reindex — no destructive actions
